title: In the Skies, Streets and Stories: MTU Enterprise Program Continues to Expand After 26 Years
summary_en: Rooted in discovery-based learning for 26 years, Michigan Tech's Enterprise Program continues to grow, offering new aerospace, data science and publishing teams with a fresh take on interdisciplinary teamwork to produce measurable results for real clients.  On a campus where  . . .
title_cn: 《密歇根理工大学运营26年的创业项目持续拓展 覆盖空中、街巷及实践案例多领域》
summary_cn: 近日，美国密歇根理工大学发布相关公告，宣布该校已运行26年的创业实践项目正式启动新一轮拓展工作，项目覆盖范围进一步延伸至航空实践、城市街巷服务、实践案例体系建设三大领域。

title: Mile by Mile: Recycled Rubber Asphalt Road Research Makes Michigan More Resilient
summary_en: More than 10 million scrap tires are produced annually in Michigan alone. Michigan Tech researcher Zhanping You is recycling those tires and turning them into new, more durable roads across the state, expanding the field of sustainable infrastructure.  When Zhanping  . . .
title_cn: 《逐英里推进：回收橡胶沥青路面研究增强密歇根州发展韧性》
